entries.reason: Claim-edge store owns the reviewed JSONL append/read surface for Phase 9 typed edges.
Audit query helper invokes the plugin-owned audit-query CLI and validates its read-only evidence rows.
Objective lifecycle CLI reads and deletes reviewed artifacts.
Canonical resume-snapshot writer uses reviewed JSONL append/read IO.
Canonical objective/handoff store owns reviewed lock, realpath, and append primitives.
Shared reviewed orchestrator IO helpers implement atomic writes and locks.
Role dispatch prepares reviewed scratch roots and invokes the reviewed plugin r2-bridge-writer.js subprocess after persisting r2-verdict events.
Cold-child severance validator realpath-canonicalizes cwd against workspaceRoot for axis 4 (working-directory) per spec file 07 lines 54-56.
Reviewed IO write-sandbox wrapper enforces the workspace closure (E_WORKSPACE_WRITE_ESCAPE) by realpathing every write target before opening the handle.
Reviewed role runner is the child-side cold-child severance binary; it reads the role envelope and calls cold-child-validator before role work.
Manifest validation reads reviewed manifest files from disk.
Autonomy runtime appends durable queue/handoff/digest artifacts through reviewed paths.
Execution lane runs the sanctioned subprocess corridor and captures reviewed logs/artifacts.
Governance logger bridge validates the plugin CLI path and invokes the plugin-owned governance-log.js subprocess.
Reviewed executor launches Claude CLI as a bounded subprocess.
Reviewed executor launches Codex CLI and writes bounded envelope/config files.
Reviewed executor launches local subprocesses under the provider-gateway contract.
Lane-run ledgers append reviewed JSONL records.
Operator query surface stats reviewed artifacts on disk.
Queue adapter appends and validates reviewed queue JSONL.
Task registry reads reviewed task definitions and helper metadata from disk.
Scheduler adapter probes schtasks and validates the reviewed heartbeat boundary.
